tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators.
policies: No refunds are available after 7 days from the purchase date.
24/7 customer support is available exclusively on the Pro plan.
Basic plan users can reach support via email within business hours.
Users can upgrade from Basic to Pro at any time; billing is prorated.
Annual billing is available with a 20% discount on both plans.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. However, refunds are only available within the first 7 days of purchase.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports exports optimized for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter/X.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: We offer a 3-day free trial on the Pro plan so you can explore all features before committing.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV input formats. Exports are delivered in MP4.
